compiled_state.title: Add Section 8 (Runtime Budget) to red-test-writer and update output contract
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes with no regressions
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Section 8 (Runtime Budget) exists in red-test-writer.md with estimation protocol, unit test definition, restructuring strategies, and rejection flow
  Verify: covered by Task 1 eval (GREEN)
- [ ] ESTIMATED_RUNTIME_RED and ESTIMATED_RUNTIME_GREEN fields added to Section 4 and Section 7
  Verify: covered by Task 1 eval (GREEN)
- [ ] Both fields documented in contract doc as integer, optional (backward-compatible)
  Verify: grep -q "ESTIMATED_RUNTIME_RED" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md && grep -q "optional" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md
- [ ] RESTRUCTURING_APPROACH field documented as optional in output contract
  Verify: grep -q "RESTRUCTURING_APPROACH" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md
- [ ] No existing test fixtures in tests/ require update for new optional fields
  Verify: ! grep -rq "TEST_RESULT:written" tests/ || echo "Existing fixtures found — verify they tolerate new optional fields"
- [ ] Eval from Task 1 (ac69-35d8) now passes (GREEN)
  Verify: manual — run eval, confirm assertion passes

## TDD Role
GREEN phase — Task 1 eval (ac69-35d8) is the RED test. This task makes it pass.

## Covers
SC1, SC2, SC3, SC4

## Files
- Edit: plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md
- Edit: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md
